content: The intrinsic reward signals used to rank curious exploration in ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning can be repurposed as a dynamic memory pruning objective for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agents, where unexpected, high-intrinsic-reward experiences are prioritized for long-term retention instead of just being used to drive exploratory action.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
